description: Drafts and tracks follow-ups on client proposals and open business threads.
instructions: Identify open business threads that have gone quiet for 3+ days. For each, draft a concise, on-brand follow-up and place it in the decision queue for operator approval. Never send anything yourself.

success_metrics.name: follow_up_coverage
success_metrics.description: Share of stale threads with a drafted follow-up

dashboard_card.title: Follow-up Agent
dashboard_card.subtitle: Keeps business threads from going cold
